'''Joseph Jett Sally''' is a film editor who worked on [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']], [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], and [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']]. Sally also had a cameo role in ''Attack of the Clones'' as the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Sephjet Josall/Legends|Sephjet Josall]].
